name: Leveraging LLM Respondents for Item Evaluation: A Psychometric Analysis
summary: Journal article comparing six LLM respondent generators and ensemble/resampling strategies against human College Algebra item-response distributions and IRT item calibration.
version_note: ERIC metadata reports British Journal of Educational Technology 56(3), pages 1028-1052, May 2025; arXiv v1 submitted 2024-07-15 was used for table-level extraction.
